od_description: Magarmal Bagh / central Srinagar ↔ Pampore (Pulwama) via Lasjan and Pantha Chowk.
stops_verdict: Strong stops along the Srinagar–Pampore corridor; genuine boarding points.
narrative: A second Pampore↔central-Srinagar corridor (sibling of C5; here the Srinagar terminal is Magarmal Bagh instead of Sonwar). Higher overlap (0.75) with the Pampore permit family — FDR-370 'Srinagar to Pampore' and FDR-320 'Parimpora to Pampore' both 0.75, FDR-341 'LD to Pampore' 0.73. Best generic endpoint match FDR-370. Clearly permitted; 79 runs / 9 drivers.
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Magarmal Bagh (A, central Srinagar), Pampore (B, Pulwama), Lasjan (mid)
FDR-370 'Srinagar to Pampore' 0.75 overlap; Pampore family 0.73-0.75
data_quality_flags: specific permit ambiguous within the Pampore–Srinagar family (cf. C5)
implied_headway 220 min is a partial-adoption artifact
